title: Chili
description: Hearty, rich chili made with ground beef or chicken, beans, tomatoes, and warming spices. A true crowd-pleaser.

ingredients.item: lean ground beef OR 1 cup cooked chicken breast

ingredients.note: no seeds or skins if possible

steps.instruction: Brown ground beef or cook chicken through in a skillet. Drain all fat.
Combine meat, beans, tomatoes, tomato paste, broth, and all spices in a pot.
Simmer over medium-low heat for 20–25 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly (5 minutes).
Stir in sour cream and shredded cheese until incorporated.
Serve hot with your favorite toppings.

notes: Sour cream adds creaminess and richness. Cheese increases protein. This chili tastes even better the next day!
